gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/15)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/15)

parts.text: أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَعْنِي الْأَوَّلَ

text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ مَنْ أَخْرَجَ زَكَاةَ مَالِهِ تَامَّةً فَوَضَعَهَا فِي مَوْضِعِهَا لَمْ يُسْأَلْ مِنْ أَيْنَ اكْتَسَبَ مَالَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ali Bin Uqba,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al Hassanasws, meaning the 1st, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘The one who takes out the complete Zakāt of his wealth, so he places it in its (appropriate) place, would not be asked (on the Day of Judgement) from where he earned his wealth’.
en.sarwar: 9. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn Faddal from Ali ibn ‘Uqbah from abu al-Hassan, the first, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, who has said the following: “If one pays, completely, the amount of zakat which is due on his wealth to the proper recipient, he is not asked how he has earned his wealth.”
